title: Verification Commitments Schema
description: Authoritative schema for verification.json — the pre-impl commitment set authored by base:story-planner Mode 3 for each story

story_id.description: Story identifier this verification file belongs to (form: S<N>, e.g. S1)

authored_by.description: Agent that authored the pre-impl questions (always story-planner)

authored_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this file was authored

questions.description: Ordered list of verification questions (pre-impl and post-impl records)

phase.description: pre-impl questions are locked by story-planner; post-impl questions are appended by integration-architect after implementation

category.description: Question category — MUST use 'category' not 'type' as the field name

ac_id.description: AC identifier this question covers — set only on SPEC questions derived from an AC; omit on all other question categories

question.description: The normative verification question text — must be a concrete, evidence-demanding question
